name: San Bernardino City Unified School District
profileTitle: SBCUSD District Profile for Calendar Planning
searchAliases: San Bernardino City Unified School District
districtFact: San Bernardino City Unified School District, also known as SBCUSD, is a public school district serving about 47,000 TK-12 students in San Bernardino, San Bernardino County, California and nearby Inland Empire communities. The district publishes traditional school calendar PDFs with bilingual date labels, minimum days, teacher work days, professional development days, parent-teacher conference windows, and separate Middle College High School calendar information.

about.title: About San Bernardino City Unified
about.content: San Bernardino City Unified School District, also known as SBCUSD, is a public school district serving about 47,000 TK-12 students in San Bernardino, San Bernardino County, California and nearby Inland Empire communities. Its traditional school calendars list first day, last day, holidays, Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Recess, Spring Break, teacher work days, professional development days, back-to-school nights, open house dates, minimum days, and parent-teacher conferences.

about.title: How to Use This SBCUSD Calendar
about.content: Use this page for the district traditional school calendar and major dates. Families should confirm school-specific events, bell schedules, graduation details, and the Middle College High School calendar through SBCUSD and their campus.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for San Bernardino Families
content: Track minimum days separately because the calendar marks all-student minimum days and high-school-final minimum days.
Check elementary parent-teacher conference weeks because other students may have full days while elementary schedules change.
Confirm whether your student follows the traditional calendar or the Middle College High School calendar.
Use the official SBCUSD school year calendars page for revised PDFs and campus-specific updates.

compareIntro: Compare the San Bernardino City Unified (SBCUSD) school calendar with other California district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Families often compare nearby districts when planning relocation, enrollment, childcare, shared activities, or Inland Empire travel. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which San Bernardino City Unified calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the SBCUSD traditional school calendar PDFs, including first day, last day, holidays, recesses, teacher work days, professional development days, minimum days, and parent-teacher conferences.

districtFaqs.q: Does SBCUSD have a Middle College High School calendar?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. SBCUSD publishes a separate Middle College High School calendar for 2026-2027, linked on the 2026-2027 year page as an alternate calendar.

districtFaqs.q: Does every SBCUSD school use the same minimum days?
districtFaqs.a: Not always. The traditional calendar distinguishes all-student minimum days, high-school-final minimum days, and elementary conference dates. Families should confirm campus schedules.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify SBCUSD calendar changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official SBCUSD school year calendars page and campus announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with SBCUSD.

customSections.label: Print SBCUSD Calendar 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families who need a print-friendly SBCUSD calendar can use the official PDF for a saved copy or use the Print Calendar button on this page after reviewing the key dates.

groups.label: Print-friendly options
items: Open the official SBCUSD calendar PDF from the download section when you need the district-published printable file.
Use the Print Calendar button on this page for a parent-friendly printout of the searchable MySchoolDates calendar view.
Use the .ics calendar file when you want to import SBCUSD holidays, breaks, and important dates into a digital calendar.

customSections.label: SBCUSD Calendar Planning Guide 2026-2027
customSections.content: Planning ahead with the SBCUSD calendar can help San Bernardino families arrange childcare, vacations, appointments, transportation, and student activities around districtwide dates.

groups.label: Longest breaks and travel windows
items: Winter Recess is the longest student break in the 2026-2027 traditional calendar, running December 21, 2026 through January 8, 2027.
Spring Break runs March 22-April 2, 2027, giving families a second extended planning window before the final quarter of the year.
Thanksgiving Recess runs November 23-27, 2026, and is a common short-travel and childcare planning period.

groups.label: School return and end-of-year planning
items: School starts August 3, 2026 as a minimum day, so families should confirm bell schedules before the first week.
The last day of school and graduation date is June 3, 2027.
High school finals and minimum days begin June 1, 2027, so students may have schedule changes before the final day.

groups.label: Campus-specific checks
items: Confirm parent-teacher conference schedules with your assigned school.
Check whether your student follows the traditional calendar or the separate Middle College High School calendar.
Verify athletics, graduation details, testing windows, transportation notices, and same-day updates through campus announcements.

customSections.label: SBCUSD 2026-2027 Calendar Highlights
customSections.content: These calendar highlights summarize what stands out in the 2026-2027 SBCUSD traditional school year without repeating the full date list.

groups.label: What families should notice
items: SBCUSD starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 3, 2026, earlier than many California district calendars.
The school year includes three major districtwide break periods: Thanksgiving Recess, Winter Recess, and Spring Break.
Winter Recess is the longest continuous student break, running from December 21, 2026 through January 8, 2027.
The final school month includes minimum days, high school finals, graduation activities, and a June 3, 2027 last day.
Families with Middle College High School students should review the separate MCHS calendar before relying on the traditional calendar.

customSections.label: Important Notes for SBCUSD Families
customSections.content: The district calendar is the best starting point for major dates, but some schedule details can vary by school, program, or grade level.

groups.label: Confirm before making plans
items: Some schools may have additional events, bell schedules, and activity dates not listed on the districtwide calendar.
Minimum days and parent-teacher conference schedules may vary by grade span.
The Middle College High School calendar is published separately from the traditional calendar.
Families should use the official SBCUSD school year calendars page and campus notices for last-minute changes.
